sections.paragraph:
ἀποδιϋλισμός, οῦ, ὁ (s. ἀποδιϋλίζω) filtering fig., purification fr. evil elements (opp. μερισμός) IPhld 3:1.

  1. fr. = from

opp. opp. = opposed to, opposite

IPhld IPhld = Ignatius to the Philadelphians—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 110
